title: ERROR2011
description:
ERROR2011 is a corrupted interface mod inspired by the digital mythos of CoolGamer.

body:
🧬 **Description**

**ERROR2011** is a corrupted interface mod inspired by the digital mythos of CoolGamer.
It introduces mysterious artifacts, strange behavior, and a visual experience that feels… broken — intentionally.
Dive into a glitched, eerie layer of Minecraft's UI and world logic. Nothing is quite as it seems.
💡 **Features**

 🖥️ Terminal-like blocks with glitchy UI

 🧱 Custom blocks and logic-based interactions

 📡 Network packet handling for custom server-client behavior

 🕳️ Minimalist, mythos-inspired design — feels like a system gone wrong

 🧪 Acts as a foundation for larger narrative mods or ARG-style experiences

📁 **Installation**

Install [Minecraft 1.20.1](https://multimc.org/) /w [Forge 47.4.0](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html)

Place ERROR2011-x.x.x.jar in your mods folder. Typically "C:                                                              \Users\username\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\mods"

Launch the game and experience the corruption

🛠️ **Dev Notes**

This is just the alpha. I will release some cool new version with new things, all ideas can be routed through my [Github](https://github.com/Cyan-476). Be patient!

Created by Cyan.
